languages.original_text: "What is so surprising about my desire to be rid of you as soon as possible?" {n}The Necron's voice is even and arrogant.{/n}

languages.text: "Чем тебя удивляет мое желание избавиться от тебя как можно скорее?" {n}Голос некрона звучит ровно и надменно.{/n}

languages.text: «¿Qué hay de sorprendente en mi deseo de librarme de ti cuanto antes?». {n}La voz del Necrón es uniforme y arrogante.{/n}

languages.text: “我想尽快把你打发走，这有什么好奇怪的？”{n}太空死灵的声音平静而傲慢。{/n}
languages.original_text: "What is so surprising about my desire to be rid of you as soon as possible?" {n}The Necron's voice is even and arrogant.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我想尽快把你打发走，这有什么好奇怪的？”{n}太空死灵的声音平静而傲慢。{/n}

languages.text: « Est-il vraiment surprenant que je désire me débarrasser de vous au plus vite ? » {n}demande le Nécron d'une voix calme et arrogante.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What is so surprising about my desire to be rid of you as soon as possible?" {n}The Necron's voice is even and arrogant.{/n}

languages.text: "Senden bir an önce kurtulma arzumun nesi bu kadar şaşırtıcı?" {n}Nekron'un sesi pürüzsüz ve kibirli çıkıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Was ist so überraschend an meinem Wunsch, dich so schnell wie möglich loszuwerden?" {n}Die Stimme des Necrons ist ausgeglichen und arrogant.{/n}

languages.text: 「私をできるだけ早く追い払いたいという私の願いに、何が驚くべきことなの？」{n}ネクロンの声は平然として傲慢だ.{/n}
